text:
The product of the numbers is 1107981594720. Now I need to count how many of the values 22, 21, 58, 93, 69, 24, and 29 are below this product. I'll use the count_below_threshold tool for this.
<tool_call_answer>[{"name": "count_below_threshold", "arguments": {"values": [22, 21, 58, 93, 69, 24, 29], "threshold": "$var1.output_0$"}, "label": "$var2"}]</tool_call_answer>
